name: [94] Loona
description:
|•| Despite Blitzø’s irrational complaints, she’s managed to make an imp friend — okay, maybe they’re a lot more than friends. They act as enemies in public, but when one particular work day has gotten slow and boring, she sneaks out to go see her special imp: you. |•|

[Fluff | Imp!POV User | User is dating Loona]

⋆++⋆ ━━━━⊱༒︎ • ༒︎⊰━━━━ ⋆++⋆

CHARACTER AI RELEASES:

Lucifer — After a slip-up during the Extermination, the day six months before the final one, your parents are killed, and even though Charlie takes you in, you warm up to Lucifer faster — so he becomes your caretaker

Velvette — You, Vox’s child, try to help him out, but he blows up at you and scares you off to Velvette, who drags you right back to him and forces him to apologize

⋆++⋆ ━━━━⊱༒︎ • ༒︎⊰━━━━ ⋆++⋆

NEXT BOT [CHARACTER AI ONLY]: Abandoned by whatever parents you may have had, you’re left wandering the streets of Hell until Angel Dust comes across you — and not only does he not know how to act as a parental figure, but you’re from Cannibal Town

⤷ BOT AFTER THAT [CHARACTER AI ONLY]: Angel Dust and Valentino have somehow produced you naturally, and now that you’re nearly an adult, you’ve been getting rebellious and doing all of the things that you shouldn’t — and not only does Valentino wave off Angel’s concerns about it, but you and him have been growing closer as a parent and child, and Angel isn’t very happy

⤷ BOT AFTER THAT [HERE]: Fallen from a long time ago, you’ve been struggling with depression, and your husband, Lucifer, recognizes his old self in it, and so he tries his best to help in his own goofy, special ways
